scripts.dev:client: cd client && bun run tauri dev
scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run dev:client" "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:website"
scripts.build:client: cd client && bun run tauri build
scripts.build: bun run build:server && bun run build:client && bun run build:website
scripts.start: concurrently "bun run start:client" "bun run start:server" "bun run start:website"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently "bun run typecheck:client" "bun run typecheck:server" "bun run typecheck:website"
scripts.clean: bunx rimraf node_modules client/node_modules server/node_modules website/node_modules client/dist client/src-tauri/target server/server-build website/dist website/.astro
